title: oxytropis sericea var. sericea
intro: Oxytropis sericea var. sericea, also known as the silky globemallow, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The silky globemallow is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally utilized to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as being used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Oxytropis sericea var. sericea include tea, tincture, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water.
